request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 20,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b3",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "新業務表現",
      "current_translation": "New Business Performance",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.514,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 5,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        91.03,

      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b5",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "2020年\n2019年\n新業務價值變動",
      "current_translation": "2020\n2019\nNew Business Value Change",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.693,
      "line_count": 3,
      "char_count": 19,
      "bbox": [
        227.46,
        151.81,

        163.03
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b6",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "新業務\n價值\n利潤率\n年化\n新保費\n新業務\n價值",
      "current_translation": "New Business\nValue\nMargin\nAnnualized\nNew Premiums\nNew Business\nValue",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.588,
      "line_count": 7,
      "char_count": 24,
      "bbox": [
        229.2,
        167.28,
        334.87,
        199.78
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b7",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "新業務\n價值\n利潤率\n年化\n新保費\n按年變動\n（固定匯率）\n按年變動\n（實質匯率）",
      "current_translation": "New Business\nValue\nMargin\nAnnualized\nNew Premiums\nYear-on-Year\nChange\n(Constant Exchange Rate)\nYear-on-Year\nChange\n(Actual Exchange Rate)",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "overflow",
      "current_font_ratio": 1.0,
      "line_count": 9,
      "char_count": 41,
      "bbox": [
        348.26,
        167.48,
        525.84,
        199.77
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b16",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "為符合合併準備金及\n資本要求所作調整\n(103)\n無意義\n無意義\n(87)\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義",
      "current_translation": "Adjustments for consolidation\nreserves and capital requirements\n(103)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\n(87)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.383,
      "line_count": 10,
      "char_count": 53,
      "bbox": [
        79.5,
        312.24,
        521.71,
        334.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b17",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "未分配集團總部開支的\n稅後價值\n(161)\n無意義\n無意義\n(154)\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義",
      "current_translation": "After-tax value of unallocated\nGroup head office expenses\n(161)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\n(154)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.47,
      "line_count": 10,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        79.51,
        338.21,
        521.72,
        359.99
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b19",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "非控股權益\n(24)\n無意義\n無意義\n(32)\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義\n無意義",
      "current_translation": "Non-controlling interests\n(24)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\n(32)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.536,
      "line_count": 9,
      "char_count": 39,
      "bbox": [
        79.54,
        379.43,
        521.76,
        390.93
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 8.5,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b21",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普",
      "current_translation": "Although new business value of USD 2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.598,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        432.05,
        527.25,
        444.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b22",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個",
      "current_translation": "AIA's China business made the largest contribution to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was the first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region gradually relaxed strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.564,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        448.05,
        527.24,
        460.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內",
      "current_translation": "Excluding new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, the Group's other segments showed strong recovery in new business value in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.581,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        464.05,
        527.25,
        476.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b24",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業",
      "current_translation": "The Group's new business development momentum remained strong in 2021, with new business value in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding period in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.785,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        480.05,
        527.23,
        492.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b25",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同期高出15%。",
      "current_translation": "AIA's China business recorded successful momentum in 2021, with new business value in the first two months showing very strong growth compared to the corresponding period in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.518,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 39,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        496.06,
        387.96,
        508.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險中國業務在2021年錄得成功的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值與2020年同期比較，錄得非常強勁的增",
      "current_translation": "New business value of USD 968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% compared to 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the first quarter following the initial outbreak of COVID-19.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.76,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        528.06,
        527.24,
        540.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b27",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "長。2020年新業務價值9.68億美元較2019年減少17%，主要由於2019冠狀病毒病在第一季爆發初期而導致銷售額",
      "current_translation": "As movement restrictions were relaxed, new business momentum improved rapidly. New business value resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with a greater proportion concentrated in the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.664,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 58,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        544.06,
        527.19,
        556.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b29",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "半年。在2020年，友邦保險中國業務為集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻。",
      "current_translation": "Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland China visitors to AIA's Hong Kong business were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in new business value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 34,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        576.07,
        369.63,
        588.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b30",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導",
      "current_translation": "The new business value margin recorded a decline, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volume, changes in product mix and the effect of lower interest rates.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.646,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        608.07,
        527.25,
        620.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b31",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及",
      "current_translation": "Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors at the end of September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        624.07,
        527.12,
        636.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b32",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回",
      "current_translation": "Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors at the end of September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        640.07,
        527.25,
        652.03
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b33",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。",
      "current_translation": "Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors at the end of September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 37,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        656.08,
        414.8,
        668.03
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    }
  ]
}
